name: Oakhaven Town
description: A peaceful village nestled in the valley. A good place to rest, trade, and find new bounties.

name: Whispering Woods
description: A dense forest filled with mysterious sounds. The trees seem to watch your every move.

name: Echostone Caverns
description: Dark, damp caves where only the desperate or foolish venture.

name: Ruins of Aethelgard
description: An ancient stronghold, now overrun by dark forces.

name: The Dark Throne
description: The heart of the ruins. The air here is heavy with dark magic.
